description:
# A11y Baseline

Install eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y, wire it into the ESLint config, and verify @storybook/addon-a11y is enabled in preview.tsx. Quick win that unblocks the Storybook milestone.

## Phases
1. Install and configure eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y
2. Wire @storybook/addon-a11y in Storybook preview
title: [Epic] A11y Baseline
